visual_description: The man in a blue shirt and tie sits in an office chair with blinds behind him, tilting his head back with his eyes closed. He then turns his head to the side, opens his eyes, and looks downward. The shot cuts to a close-up of a silver mobile phone and an identification card resting on a plastic surface.
audio_description: There is no audible sound in this segment.
